name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity reports unknown_count=<N> in the dirty-audit summary line per §25.2
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf 'F-4 minimal\n' > arch/a.md && printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"echo alpha: 1; echo beta: 2; echo gamma: 3","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > pending/F-4-x/c.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'unknown_count=3' out.txt && echo counted 1>&2
